title: Passaging of feeder-free hPSCs
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"1hnup","text":"This protocol describes the process of passaging human pluripotent stem cells (hPSCs) for feeder-free culturing of hPSCs using Accutase or ReLeSF","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"1drs5","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"aa5rn","text":"Protocol overview","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"bold","offset":0,"length":17}],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"7v18a","text":"A. Accutase","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"hdli","text":"B. ReLeSR","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"b50cb","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"bsble","text":"General Notes:","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"bold","offset":0,"length":14}],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"bpime","text":"For this protocol, hPSCs refers collectively to hiPSCs and hESCs. All described procedures have been tested and work equally well for hiPSCs and hESCs.","type":"ordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"3l4au","text":"Until otherwise indicated, feeder-free hPSCs are routinely grown in a humidified cell culture incubator under “low” oxygen conditions. We have successfully maintained hPSCs using either 3% O2 (3% O2, 5% CO2) or 5% O2 (5% O2, 5% CO2) conditions.","type":"ordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"adnd2","text":"We have routinely maintained feeder-free cells in either mTeSR-plus or StemFlex, however these two mediums are not interchangeable. Pick one and stick to it.","type":"ordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"chdkt","text":"We have routinely maintained feeder-free hPSC cultures on VTN, Matrigel and Geltrex coated cell culture plates without observing obvious differences.","type":"ordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"bold","offset":148,"length":1}],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"2k9re","text":"We have routinely passaged feeder-free hPSCs using either Accutase (as single cell suspension) or ReLeSR (as cell aggregates) without observing obvious differences. ","type":"ordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"1ispe","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
before_start: {"blocks":[{"key":"6gi2h","text":"Prior to passaging, prepare VTN/Matrigel/Geltrex-coated plates. A detailed protocol for this procedure can be found in the protocol \"Coating plates,\" which is located in the \"Feeder-free culturing of hPSCs\" collection. A link to this collection can be found in the title section of this protocol, located above","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}

steps: Wash hPSCs with DPBS
Add 1 ml Accutase/well to the 6-well plate.
Incubate 00:05:00 37 °C
Add 2 ml DMEM/F12 to each well.
Collect all cells into 15 ml conical tube.
Add 7 ml DMEM/F12.
Centrifuge at 200-300 x g, °C, 5 minutes
Re-suspend cell pellet in 1 ml Feeder-Free Medium + Rock inhibitor. Use a P1000 tip and triturate 5-10 times to achieve single-cell suspension
Aspirate VTN/Matrigel/Geltrex solution from the coated plate, add 2 ml Feeder-Free Medium + Rock inhibitor to each well.
Dispense the proper amount of cells to VTN/Matrigel/Geltrex-coated plates. The splitting ratio differs between cell lines but is usually within a range of 1:6 to 1:30.

When hPSCs density reaches 50-80% confluency, passage again or freeze. It usually takes 5-7 days. A detailed description for freezing can be found in the "Freezing of feeder-free hPSCs" protocol within the "Feeder-free culturing of hPSCs" collection. A link to this collection can be found in the title section of this protocol, located above
Change 2 ml pre-warmed Feeder-free medium for each well every other day.
Spread the cells by moving the plate in left-right, then backward-forward motion.
Place the plate in the low oxygen incubator
Wash the feeder-free hPSCs twice with DPBS
Add 1 ml/well of ReLeSR to a 6-well pate and incubate at Room temperature for 00:01:00
Remove the ReLeSR solution and let it sit at Room temperature 00:02:00
Add 2 ml of Feeder-free medium/well.
Gently scrape the cells from the bottom of the well by using a Corning cell lifter.
Collect the cells in a 15 ml conical tube and add 3 ml of Feeder-free medium.
Gently mix by inversion and gravity precipitate for 00:05:00
Remove the supernatant down to 1 ml and add 5 ml of Feeder-free medium.
Gently mix by inversion and gravity precipitate for 00:05:00
Remove the supernatant down to 1 ml.

Dilute the cells with the desired volume and carefully plate cell aggregates on VTN/Matrigel/Geltrex-coated plates in Feeder-free medium. The splitting ratio differs between cell lines but is usually within a range of 1:6 to 1:30.

When hPSCs density reaches 50-80% confluency, passage again or freeze. It usually takes 5-7 days. A detailed protocol for freezing can be found in the "Feeder-free culturing of hPSCs" collection. A link to this collection can be found in the title section of this protocol, located above.
Change 2 ml pre-warmed Feeder-free medium for each well every other day or if necessary earlier.
Place the plate in the low oxygen incubator.
Spread the cells by moving the plate in left-right, then back-fourth motion.

Feeder-free Medium (version A) %s %s StemFlex basal medium 450 ml StemFlex supplement 50 ml Feeder-free Medium (version B) %s %s mTeSR-plus basal medium 400 ml mTeSR-plus supplement 100 ml - Feeder-free mediums (version A & B) are not interchangeable. Pick one and stick to it. - It is possible to include 5 ml Penicillin & Streptomycin (100X) in the feeder-free medium Y-27632 (1,000X) %s %s Y-27632 5 mg DMSO 1.56 ml Feeder-free medium + Rock inhibitor %s %s Feeder-free medium 50 ml Y-27632 (1,000X) 50 ul
Aspirate supernatant
